constraints.execution: single-process sequential GPU/CPU training; no concurrent heavy experiments

interpretation: Adopt as a product-integration candidate for guarded 60Hz runtime testing, not as product code yet. The strongest deployable shape is a hardtanh tiny MLP over FSMN-style causal features. It exports real arrays and passes both generated-shape parity and real C# compile/run parity; app-loop latency measurement and product feature-input integration remain open.
